backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the incident management backend with CRUD operations: createIncident, addUpdate, changeStatus, deleteIncident, and getAllIncidents, storing incidents in a Map keyed by ID.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a ground-up rewrite of frontend-to-backend wiring, covering actor initialization, React Query hooks, provider ordering, and Vite environment variable consistency.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing the purpose and key implementation details of each file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color tokens for background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root into a div with id 'root' and loading the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and TanStack RouterProvider with routes for the Dashboard (/) and AdminPanel (/admin) wrapped in a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/AddUpdateForm.ts: Form component for appending a timestamped update message to an existing incident, using an incident selector dropdown and the useAddUpdate mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ChangeStatusForm: Form component for changing an incident's status, displaying the current status for context and using the useChangeStatus mutation hook with a status dropdown.
frontend/src/components/CreateIncidentFo: A React form component for creating new incidents, using react-hook-form for validation, checking ID uniqueness before submission, and accepting fields for ID, title, description, affected service, and severity.
frontend/src/components/IncidentCard.tsx: Displays a single incident as a collapsible card showing severity, status, affected service, timestamps, description, and a sorted list of updates.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the app shell with a sticky header (navigation links, theme toggle, logout button), a main content area, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/SeverityBadge.ts: Renders a styled badge for incident severity levels (critical, major, minor, informational) with color-coded styles and an animated dot for critical.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a styled badge for incident status values (investigating, identified, monitoring, resolved) with distinct color schemes per status.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between dark and light themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a sun or moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend incident operations: fetching all/single incidents, creating, updating, changing status, deleting, and checking ID uniqueness.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Wraps next-themes to expose the current resolved theme, a dark mode boolean, and a toggle function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including status and severity colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin page gated behind Internet Identity authentication, providing tabbed forms to create incidents, add updates, change status, and delete resolved incidents.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Public dashboard page that displays all incidents with search and filter controls for status and severity, split into active and resolved sections.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based colors, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, version, architectural notes, known issues, and existing features for an internal IT status page dashboard with public read-only view and authenticated admin panel.
